scripts.migrate:up: npx dbmate -e DEVELOPMENT_DB_URL up && npx zapatos
scripts.migrate:down: npx dbmate -e DEVELOPMENT_DB_URL down && npx zapatos
scripts.test-db:start: docker run --publish 127.0.0.1:8080:5432/tcp --name test-db -e POSTGRES_PASSWORD=testPass -e POSTGRES_USER=testUser -e POSTGRES_DB=test -d postgres; sleep 0.5; npm run migrate-test:up
scripts.test-db:stop: docker stop test-db; docker rm test-db
scripts.test:database: TEST_USER=testUser TEST_PASS=testPass TEST_HOST=127.0.0.1 TEST_PORT=8080 TEST_DB=test jest -i --testPathPatterns=/src/ropewiki/test/database/*
scripts.test:local: npm run test:unit; npm run test-db:start; npm run test:database; npm run test-db:stop
